Meaning.En: To take legal action against someone in a court of law, typically to claim compensation for damage or loss.
Meaning.Example: The company decided to sue the manufacturer after the product caused serious injuries.

Situation.Vi: Một người hoặc tổ chức đưa vụ việc ra tòa để đòi bồi thường hoặc thực thi quyền lợi.
Situation.En: A person or organization brings a case to court to seek compensation or enforce their rights.

Meaning.En: To formally ask for someone’s hand in marriage, especially in a traditional or formal context (archaic).
Meaning.Example: He sued for the hand of the merchant’s daughter in marriage.

Situation.Vi: Người đàn ông chính thức xin phép cha mẹ cô gái để được kết hôn (ngày xưa).
Situation.En: A man formally requests the bride’s parents’ permission to marry their daughter (in former times).
